caveat: The D4 signature, per physics variant, at step 50: in every one of the four variants the density head collapsed to a near-uniform near-zero sliver (spreads 8.9e-7 to 2.0e-4 against a 1.45 floor -- four dead heads) while the neutral-fraction head kept structure (spreads 4.9x to 113x above its floor) and the mean flux landed on 1.000 -- the transparent-gas tell, in four-part unison. Read alongside the embedding distances (fig2b): the four variants were given genuinely distinct learned labels, and all four arrived at the same trivial solution. Step-50 endpoints (the per-step per-head trace was not logged). Single realization / fixed cosmology (Sherwood, one 60 cMpc/h box); z=0.3 scope-lock.
